title: GRIT Trainee - [Marketing]
description:
About Team

Our Marketing teams conceptualise and execute innovative go-to-market strategies to grow our brand presence and engage millions of users. We work closely with regional teams to localise campaigns, ensuring that our marketing efforts resonate with diverse audiences across Southeast Asia and beyond.


As a GRIT Trainee in the Marketing team, you will get the opportunity to learn from experienced marketers, build a strong foundation in digital marketing, and contribute to campaigns that shape the future of e-commerce.


Job Description

This is a 6 months full-time onsite role based in Singapore as part of the GRIT Programme. The GRaduate Industry Traineeships (GRIT) Programme is an initiative by Workforce Singapore (WSG) that offers fresh graduates with traineeship opportunities across various sectors.

  • Assist the Livestream team with daily activities and execution of livestream campaigns
  • Relationship management with livestream sellers; assisting them in their needs and maintaining a positive relationship
  • Assist in analysing livestream performance data to generate meaningful insights and reports
  • Conduct competitor analysis to provide recommendations on new initiatives or areas of improvement
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams such as Business Intelligence, Marketing and Business Development as required
  • Assist in administrative tasks and marketing operations

Job Requirements

  • Graduated or graduating in 2024 and 2025 from universities, or graduated earlier and completed National Service in 2024 or 2025
  • Singapore Citizen or Singapore Permanent Resident
  • Excellent stakeholder management skills with strong ability to manage expectations, drive for performance and collaborate with internal stakeholders to deliver quality work within timelines
  • Strong communication and writing skills
  • Good team player with can-do attitude and a great attitude towards learning
  • Detail-oriented, analytical and structured thinker who is able to derive insights from data
  • Independent and self-motivated, with good end-to-end ownership of project and an openness to taking on new projects

postedCompany.description: Shopee is the leading e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Taiwan. Launched in 2015, it is a platform tailored for the region, providing customers with an easy, secure and fast online shopping experience through strong payment and fulfillment support. We believe online shopping should be accessible, easy and enjoyable. This is the vision Shopee aspires to deliver on the platform, every single day.
postedCompany.name: SHOPEE SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
